query: SELECT id, callId, actionType, status, reason FROM call_next_steps LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT id, callId, actionType, status, reason FROM call_next_steps LIMIT 10;

rows.reason: To accurately document the details of the offer call, including the offer made, the seller's motivation, and the agreed-upon next steps.
The call resulted in an offer being made and a follow-up call scheduled to get a decision, indicating the lead is now in the 'Offer Apt Scheduled' stage.
A callback was explicitly scheduled for tomorrow at 11 AM to get a 'yes' or 'no' on the offer, requiring a task to ensure it's made.
